messages.content:
I hit an error while handling this request: Run cancelled by user. I can retry with a focused fix plan.

## Suggested Next Steps
- Inspect failure [recommended]: Review the error and tool output before retrying.
  Prompt: Summarize the failure root cause and propose a concrete fix plan.
- Retry with fix: Retry run with explicit feedback constraints.
  Prompt: Retry this task and fix the reported failure first.

nextActions.label: Inspect failure
nextActions.description: Review the error and tool output before retrying.
nextActions.prompt: Summarize the failure root cause and propose a concrete fix plan.

nextActions.label: Retry with fix
nextActions.description: Retry run with explicit feedback constraints.
nextActions.prompt: Retry this task and fix the reported failure first.
